IN JURY ROOM, JUDGE PRO TEM ROSE TRACY-REINHEIMER; B. FIELDS CSR; P. LEE, CLERK ALLYCE KIMERLING, ATTY APPEAR FOR PLT CRISTINA MURILLO, APPEAR IN PRO PER 3:52PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, ARLENE ALVAREZ, DEPUTY CLERK ACTS AS SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFT. CASE SETTLED & READ INTO THE RECORDS. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN SUBSTITUTED FOR WONG, ARTHUR LANG AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
